settings.title: Settings
settings.generalDescription: Control how Radianite starts and behaves on your system.
settings.appLanguageDescription: Choose the language used by the Radianite interface and tray menu.
settings.runAtBootDescription: Launch Radianite automatically when you sign in to Windows.
settings.startMinimizedDescription: Keep Radianite in the system tray when it starts at sign-in.
settings.closeBehaviorDescription: Choose whether Radianite keeps working in the tray or quits completely.
settings.automaticUpdateChecksDescription: Check for a new Radianite version when the app starts.
settings.rememberWindowStateDescription: Restore the last window size, position, and maximized state on launch.
settings.appearanceDescription: Tune the interface for your screen and comfort.
settings.interfaceScaleDescription: Adjust the size and spacing of the entire interface.
settings.reduceMotionDescription: Disable nonessential interface animations and transitions.
settings.lowResourceModeDescription: Closing Radianite removes the graphical interface while monitoring, Discord RPC, and the OBS overlay continue from the system tray.
settings.overlayDescription: Add this URL as a Browser Source in OBS to show your live rank.
settings.overlayHideDetailsDescription: Show only your rank and RR by hiding your VALORANT ID and match details.
settings.rpcDescription: Show your current VALORANT match and rank on your Discord profile.
settings.rpcLanguageDescription: Choose the language sent to Discord independently from the app.
settings.enableRpcOnStart: Enable Discord RPC on app start
settings.enableRpcOnStartDescription: Automatically enable Discord Rich Presence when Radianite starts.
settings.aboutDescription: Your tactical VALORANT companion for every match.
